---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or enhancement for CLUE CODE
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What pain point or workflow gap does this address?

## Proposed solution
A clear description of the feature you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about and why they don't fit as well.

## Scope / impact
- Affected layer(s): `<L5 orchestrator / L7 skill engine / L4 token engine / ...>`
- Estimated effort: `<small / medium / large>`
- Breaking change? `<yes / no>`

## Additional context
Mockups, links, related discussions.
